basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG in biological sciences or biotechnology, First class Graduate degree of 4 years in the relevant field of biotechnology or bioengineering
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG in biological sciences or biotechnology. For Engineering: First class Graduate degree of 4 years in the relevant field of biotechnology or bioengineering.

selection_process: Email Application Submission Shortlisting Walk-In-Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Associate-I (non-medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Associate-I (non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Project Associate-I (non-medical) posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-I (non-medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate degree in biological sciences or biotechnology, or a first-class Graduate degree of 4 years in biotechnology or bioengineering is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I (non-medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send their complete application via email to the designated address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I (non-medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves email application submission, shortlisting, a walk-in interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 751019.

faq.question: Q10. When is the tentative walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The tentative walk-in interview date is 24th June 2026.
